patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 bypass on COL@PIT: edge=-7.22pp on PLATINUM tier should collapse grade to B- (score=1) per the rule, but grade=B (score=2) with no [HARD CAP 1] entry in grade_reasons — flagged as a code path issue requiring investigation.

F3 pipeline extreme on COL@PIT: F3=4130.9 is 2.3x above the historical maximum validated F3 (~1800, seen 05-11 SEA@HOU). Treat with same skepticism as the 9589 artifact on 05-12 SF@LAD — not a genuine signal at that magnitude.

DET@NYM repeat OVERRIDE: identical structural setup as 05-12 (grade D, f5_full_delta=0.269>0.20, fair_prob=0.365<0.42 floor, SP and PQI both AGAINST pick) where NYM won 10-2 emphatically. Consistent model misread on this specific matchup.

SEA@HOU third-game model overconfidence: HOU is 0-2 in archive vs SEA in consecutive games (05-11 Kirby 3-1, 05-12 Woo 10-2); today Luis Castillo (elite ace) confirmed via live API opposite Mike Burrows — three stacked flags and series history mandate DOWNGRADE despite F1_xera_gap=2.50 agreeing with HOU.
Three-signal GOLD bar (F3>500, edge>4pp, f5_full_delta<0.15, no flags) validated again on CHC@ATL: F3=1260.3, edge=+11.59pp, delta=0.019, no flags — archive is 3-for-3 on this configuration.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 bypass: edge=-7.22pp on a PLATINUM pick should collapse grade to B- (score=1) but grade=B (score=2) with no [HARD CAP 1] in grade_reasons — probable code path bug; flag for investigation. F3=4130.9 is 2.3x above historical max (~1800) and likely a pipeline artifact, not genuine signal. PLATINUM tier 43% historical hit rate. Negative edge means market already prices PIT much more favorably — no extractable value. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

WSH @ CIN.reasoning: CIN direction credible: Chase Burns confirmed via live API, F1_xera_gap=1.40 favors CIN, PQI delta=+16.9 confirms, grade A at 5 signals. However edge=+1.03pp sits outside the [4,15]pp staking band and confidence_downgrade=True both exclude any stake. F1* asterisk (small-sample Burns) is a residual concern. Direction is sound at moderate conviction but not actionable for staking.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: OVERRIDE to NYM. Identical structural setup as 05-12 DET@NYM (NYM won 10-2): grade D (-3), f5_full_delta=0.269 (NYM wins F5 at 75.4% via Nolan McLean), fair_prob=0.365 well below 0.42 floor, SP edge 0.99 xERA AGAINST DET, PQI AGAINST DET (delta=+17.1), acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True stacked. Market prices DET at only 36.5%. The model's full-game DET thesis requires a complete comeback after an SP-dominated first five. OVERRIDE to NYM.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: Edge=-8.3pp already outside staking band. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade=True both present. No active F-signals. MIL at 50.3% is essentially a coin flip; market has SD at 58.6% (fair_prob=0.5863), meaning market is more bullish on SD. Negative edge with no F-signals provides no directional conviction. CONFIRM SKIP.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: DOWNGRADE despite grade A. Luis Castillo (SEA, elite ace) confirmed via live API opposite Mike Burrows (HOU). F1_xera_gap=2.50 agrees with HOU per model xERA, but HOU is 0-2 in archive this series (05-11 Kirby 3-1, 05-12 Woo 10-2, both OVERRIDE wins). Three stacked flags: acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade. PLATINUM tier 43% hit rate. Edge already outside band. fair_prob=0.451 stays above 0.42 floor, preventing full OVERRIDE — DOWNGRADE to SKIP is the correct calibration.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: Grade D (-2): SP edge 1.72 xERA AGAINST STL (Jacob Lopez, OAK, confirmed via live API; better xERA than Michael McGreevy). PQI strongly AGAINST STL (delta=+23.3 late-game-degradation). Edge=+3.71pp outside [4,15]pp band. All quality signals favor OAK; direction uncertain. CONFIRM SKIP.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: Jesús Luzardo (PHI) vs Ranger Suarez (BOS) confirmed via live API. Three confirming signals: F1_xera_gap=0.93* (Luzardo better xERA), PQI confirms (delta=-7.9), Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.12). Edge=+4.14pp barely in [4,15]pp band, generating positive Kelly fractions. No pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=False). HARD CAP 5 not triggered because PQI also confirms alongside F1*. CONFIRM GOLD at reduced conviction given thin edge margin.

CHC @ ATL.reasoning: Ben Brown (CHC) vs Chris Sale (ATL) confirmed via live API. Three-signal bar cleanly met: F3=1260.3 > 500, edge=+11.59pp in [4,15]pp band, f5_full_delta=0.019 < 0.15, no stacked flags. SP edge 0.49 xERA agrees with CHC (Brown better than Sale this season). Single concern: fair_prob=0.387 < 0.42 floor. Per 05-12 lesson, one flag without a secondary signal (no f5_full_delta alarm, no confidence_downgrade) is insufficient to downgrade a three-signal GOLD pick. Archive 3-for-3 on this bar.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: Grade D (-2) with extreme f5_full_delta=0.273: KC wins F5 at 75.2% via Kris Bubic (confirmed vs Anthony Kay, CHW). SP edge 2.70 xERA AGAINST CHW (Bubic substantially better). PQI strongly AGAINST CHW (delta=-28.6 late-game-degradation). The model's CHW thesis requires a full late-inning comeback. Directional conviction very low. OVERRIDE conditions not met (fair_prob=0.438 > 0.42, confidence_downgrade=False). CONFIRM SKIP.

SF @ LAD.reasoning: HARD CAP 3 correctly fired: model_prob 0.855 > 0.85 AND f5_full_delta=0.384 > 0.20 → score forced to 0 (SKIP). Landen Roupp (SF) vs Emmet Sheehan (LAD) confirmed.
